name: photo-agent-ios-shell
description: Windows-first Capacitor shell for the unified Mira iOS app.

scripts.ios:add: npm run config:app && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: npm run config:app && npx cap sync ios && npm run ios:patch-ats
scripts.ios:open: npm run config:app && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run config:app && npx cap build ios
